title: BionIT Master Quiz – Mixed Question Types
description: This quiz uses JSON data, includes free-response questions, and checks that every question is answered before grading.

questions.prompt: What is the primary purpose of the BionIT Labs Demo Unit?
options: To replace a full prosthetic device
To explore grip modes and device behavior without a full prosthetic setup

questions.prompt: The Demo Unit must be connected to a prosthetic device before it can be powered on.
Which of the following are part of the Demo Unit system? Select all that apply.
Name the mobile application used to configure and connect BionIT devices.
Match the joystick action to its function.
What is the correct way to insert the ThunderCell battery?
options: Insert in any direction until it fits
Insert as indicated and press until it clicks

questions.prompt: EMG calibration helps map muscle signals to control prosthetic movement.
Which steps are part of connecting a device in MyoLogic Pro? Select all that apply.
options: Add device via QR code or manual entry

questions.prompt: What type of calibration is used to map muscle signals for device control?
